@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "valkey-319-support-smooth-swithover-in-standalone-mode-by-using-redirect",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "valkey: Support smooth swithover in standalone mode by using REDIRECT",
+    "description": "Support smooth swithover in standalone mode by using REDIRECT. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current valkey setup",
+        "description": "Verify your valkey version and configuration:\n```bash\nvalkey-server --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working valkey installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\nIssue: https://github.com/redis/redis/issues/12097\nPR: https://github.com/redis/redis/pull/12192\n\nIn many scenarios, we need to perform the action of switching."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support smooth swithover in standalone mode by using…",
+        "description": "To implement #319 \n\n1. replica is able to redirect read and write commands to it's primary in standalone mode\n    * reply with \"-REDIRECT primary-ip:port\"\n2. add a subcommand `CLIENT CAPA redirect`, a client can announce the capability to handle redirection\n    * if a client can handle redirection, the data access commands (read and write) will be redirected\n3. allow `readonly` and `readwrite` command in standalone mode, may be a breaking change\n    * a client with redirect capability cannot\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support smooth swithover in standalone mode by using…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "To implement #319 \n\n1. replica is able to redirect read and write commands to it's primary in standalone mode\n    * reply with \"-REDIRECT primary-ip:port\"\n2. add a subcommand `CLIENT CAPA redirect`, a client can announce the capability to handle redirection\n    * if a client can handle redirection, the data access commands (read and write) will be redirected\n3.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
